name: tidy-master
description: TidyMaster - 微信小游戏收纳整理游戏

scripts.archive:verify:chapter4: npx tsc scripts/verify-chapter4-levels.ts --module commonjs --target ES2020 --lib ES2020,DOM --esModuleInterop --moduleResolution node --skipLibCheck --outDir .tmp/verify-chapter4 && node .tmp/verify-chapter4/scripts/verify-chapter4-levels.js
